license_notes: WV requires license for GC and specialty contractors on projects over $2,500. License required before applying for description and required exams. Plumbing business must employ certified plumber; electrical must employ licensed electrician.

mandatory_clauses.label: WV contractor license disclosure
Right to cancel
mandatory_clauses.text:
RIGHT TO CANCEL: You have the right to cancel this contract within three business days. Send written notice to:
{{contractor_name}}, {{contractor_address}}

mandatory_clauses.label: Mechanics lien notice
mandatory_clauses.text:
NOTICE OF LIEN RIGHTS

Under state law, contractors, subcontractors, and material suppliers who provide labor or materials for your property and are not paid may have the right to file a mechanic's lien against your property. Even if you pay your general contractor in full, you may still be subject to liens from unpaid subcontractors and suppliers. Protect yourself by obtaining written lien waivers from all parties before making final payment.

mandatory_clauses.label: Federal 3-day right to cancel (TILA)
Not legal advice disclaimer
mandatory_clauses.text: DISCLAIMER: This contract was generated by ContractorDesk as a starting point template. It does not constitute legal advice. Contractors are encouraged to have a licensed attorney review agreements for their specific situation and applicable state requirements.

penalties_for_non_compliance: 1st offense $200-$1,000 fine. 2nd offense $500-$5,000 fine + up to 6 months jail. 3rd offense $1,000-$5,000 + 30 days-1 year jail.
notes: West Virginia requires license for GC and specialty contractors on projects over $2,500. Plumbing business must employ a certified plumber. Electrical business must employ a licensed electrician. Businesses must register with WV Tax Department. Tennessee has reciprocity with West Virginia. Federal 3-day notice satisfies state cancellation requirements (WV waives state notice for contracts at seller's office).
